title: lycopodiaceae
intro: The Lycopodiaceae rank is a family of plants, specifically a group of vascular plants that belong to the phylum Lycopodiophyta. This family includes about 400 species of club mosses, which are typically small, terrestrial plants with simple, branching stems and needle-like leaves. Lycopodiaceae plants are often found in shaded, moist environments and can be either annual or perennial. They play an important ecological role in many ecosystems, serving as food sources and habitat for various animals.
